description_long: This object is a classic Atari 2600 video game console, characterized by its low, rectangular form and distinctive ridged surface on the front half. The front panel features a set of physical switches and buttons, each labeled with yellow and white text, as well as a central cartridge slot. The left side of the front panel displays the Atari logo and '2600' branding in white. The rear of the console is plain, with no visible ports or connectors in these views. The body is primarily matte black plastic, with some metallic and electronic components likely housed inside. This object is compact and designed to rest on a flat surface, such as a table or entertainment center.
description: A matte black Atari 2600 video game console with ridged front, physical switches, and white branding on the front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Atari logo, 2600 branding, switches, and cartridge slot.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the ridged surface and the control panel layout.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back with no visible ports.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the sloped back and the absence of controls or branding.
